titles.en: Four of the Traditions of the Prophets
Four of the Traditions of the Prophets

segments: : حدثني علي بن إبراهيم ابن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن محمد بن يحيى الخزاز، عن طلحة بن زيد، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه، عن آبائه، عن علي عليهم السلام قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: أربع من سنن المرسلين: العطر، والنساء، والسواك، والحناء
arabic.text: : حدثني علي بن إبراهيم ابن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن محمد بن يحيى الخزاز، عن طلحة بن زيد، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه، عن آبائه، عن علي عليهم السلام قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: أربع من سنن المرسلين: العطر، والنساء، والسواك، والحناء

segments: 4-93 Muhammad ibn Musa ibn al-Mutevakil - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim quoted his father, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khazzaz, on the authority of Talha ibn Zayd, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq (MGB), on the authority of his father (MGB), on the authority of his grandfather (MGB), on the authority of Ali (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “The following four characteristics are from the traditions of the Messengers: perfumes, women , brushing and putting on Henna. ”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 4-93 Muhammad ibn Musa ibn al-Mutevakil - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim quoted his father, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khazzaz, on the authority of Talha ibn Zayd, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq (MGB), on the authority of his father (MGB), on the authority of his grandfather (MGB), on the authority of Ali (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “The following four characteristics are from the traditions of the Messengers: perfumes, women , brushing and putting on Henna. ”

narratorChain.raw: 4-93 حدثنا محمد بن موسى بن المتوكل رضي الله عنه قال

parts.text: محمد بن موسى بن المتوكل رضي الله عنه قال
